summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment must obtain ARPCE homologation before import or sale in Algeria under Loi n° 18-04 relative aux communications électroniques and implementing regulations. The ARPCE homologation certificate is mandatory for any device incorporating Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, or other radio interfaces. ETSI and IEC standards are referenced for technical testing but an EU CE Declaration of Conformity is not accepted by ARPCE as a substitute for Algerian homologation. CCC is not recognised. ARPCE manages spectrum licensing; unauthorised radio-frequency use is an offence under Algerian law.
summary.zh: 依据阿尔及利亚电子通信法（Loi n° 18-04）及其实施条例，所有无线电及电信终端设备须在进口或于阿尔及利亚销售前取得ARPCE（邮政与电子通信管理局）型式核准。对于内置Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝或其他无线电接口的设备，ARPCE型式核准证书为强制性要求。测试以ETSI和IEC标准作为技术参考，但欧盟CE符合性声明单独不被ARPCE接受，不可替代阿尔及利亚型式核准。CCC不被承认。ARPCE负责频谱授权管理；未经授权使用无线电频率在阿尔及利亚法律下属违规行为。
summary.zht: 依據阿爾及利亞電子通信法（Loi n° 18-04）及其實施條例，所有無線電及電信終端裝置須在進口或於阿爾及利亞銷售前取得ARPCE（郵政與電子通信管理局）型式核准。對於內建Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂巢式或其他無線電接口的裝置，ARPCE型式核准證書為強制性要求。測試以ETSI和IEC標準作為技術參考，但歐盟CE符合性聲明單獨不被ARPCE接受，不可替代阿爾及利亞型式核准。CCC不被承認。ARPCE負責頻譜授權管理；未經授權使用無線電頻率在阿爾及利亞法律下屬違規行為。

standards_or_laws: Loi n° 18-04 du 10 mai 2018 relative aux communications électroniques (Algeria)
ARPCE mandatory homologation procedures for radio and telecom terminal equipment
ETSI EN 300 328 (Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz), ETSI EN 301 893 (Wi-Fi 5 GHz), ETSI EN 300 440 (short-range devices / Bluetooth) — referenced for technical testing via IANOR NA adoptions

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval for RF transmitters under MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016, a MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment, and CCC for applicable RF equipment categories. Testing references GB standards (GB/T 9254 for EMC, GB 4943 for safety). Neither SRRC approval nor CCC is recognised by ARPCE.
summary.zh: 中国依据工信部第14号令对射频发射设备要求MIIT/SRRC无线电型号核准，对电信终端设备要求工信部进网许可证（NAL），对适用类别无线设备要求CCC认证。测试参照GB标准（EMC：GB/T 9254；安全：GB 4943）。SRRC批准和CCC均不被ARPCE承认。
summary.zht: 中國依據工信部第14號令對射頻發射設備要求MIIT/SRRC無線電型號核准，對電信終端裝置要求工信部進網許可證（NAL），對適用類別無線設備要求CCC認證。測試參照GB標準（EMC：GB/T 9254；安全：GB 4943）。SRRC批准和CCC均不被ARPCE承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/SRRC Radio Type Approval (MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for applicable RF equipment

gap.en: ARPCE homologation is a fully independent certification from SRRC, CCC, or CE mark — none of these are accepted by ARPCE. A fresh application to ARPCE with ETSI/IEC-referenced test reports from a recognised laboratory is required. Algeria has aspirations toward regulatory alignment with the EU under its Association Agreement but has not adopted CE-mark mutual recognition for radio homologation. The ARPCE certificate must be obtained before import; no provisional or post-import certification pathway is available for commercial shipments.
gap.zh: ARPCE型式核准与SRRC、CCC或CE标志完全独立——ARPCE不接受上述任何认证。须向ARPCE提交全新申请，并提供来自认可实验室的基于ETSI/IEC参考标准的测试报告。阿尔及利亚在其与欧盟的联系协定框架下有监管对接意愿，但尚未就无线型式核准采纳CE标志互认安排。ARPCE证书须在进口前取得；商业货物不存在临时或进口后认证路径。
gap.zht: ARPCE型式核准與SRRC、CCC或CE標誌完全獨立——ARPCE不接受上述任何認證。須向ARPCE提交全新申請，並提供來自認可實驗室的基於ETSI/IEC參考標準的測試報告。阿爾及利亞在其與歐盟的聯繫協定框架下有監管對接意願，但尚未就無線型式核准採納CE標誌互認安排。ARPCE證書須在進口前取得；商業貨物不存在臨時或進口後認證路徑。

source.publisher: ARPCE — Autorité de Régulation de la Poste et des Communications Électroniques (Algeria)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China SRRC approval, CCC, and CE mark do not satisfy ARPCE homologation requirements. A separate ARPCE homologation process with ETSI/IEC-referenced test reports from a recognised laboratory is required before any wireless or telecom terminal device may be imported or sold in Algeria.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC批准、CCC及CE标志均不满足ARPCE型式核准要求。任何无线或电信终端设备在阿尔及利亚进口或销售前，须另行完成基于ETSI/IEC参考测试报告（来自认可实验室）的ARPCE型式核准流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC批准、CCC及CE標誌均不滿足ARPCE型式核准要求。任何無線或電信終端裝置在阿爾及利亞進口或銷售前，須另行完成基於ETSI/IEC參考測試報告（來自認可實驗室）的ARPCE型式核准流程。
